framework.name: china_ai
framework.description: CAC Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services — China's national AI rules.

controls.name: cn-1
controls.description: File the algorithm with the CAC if the service has public-opinion or social-mobilization properties.

controls.name: cn-2
controls.description: AI-generated content must be clearly labeled for end users.

controls.name: cn-3
controls.description: Security assessment required for services with public-opinion or social-mobilization attributes.
